subject: Hatsune Miku in a flowing teal outfit, reaching forward with one hand in a gentle gesture, pastel pink and teal background suggesting a soft celebratory or intimate concert moment
suspected_ip: Hatsune Miku (Together with You module, Project DIVA F)
description: A mid-shot of a teal-haired figure with long twin tails in a light, flowing costume with pastel teal and white tones. The figure reaches one hand forward toward the viewer in an open, welcoming gesture — no object is held. The other arm is angled downward at rest. The background is soft pink and teal with scattered sparkle or confetti elements, giving the composition a warm, intimate concert-moment feel distinct from the Factory Tyrant module's industrial darkness. The overall mood is gentle and connective rather than defiant. Card value bar reads 3500, confirming Rare rarity.
foreground: Teal-haired figure in flowing pale costume, reaching one hand toward viewer
background: Soft pink and teal with sparkle or confetti scatter
emotion: warm, inviting, connective — open-palm reach toward the viewer with a gentle expression
